message:
bd-1png: Add streaming log pane for demo_showcase dashboard

Implements LogPane renderable with:
- Level-based coloring using theme styles (log.trace/debug/info/warn/error)
- HTTP method highlighting (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, HEAD, OPTIONS)
- Status code highlighting (2xx green, 4xx yellow, 5xx bold red)
- Compact timestamp formatting (ms/seconds/minutes)
- Builder pattern for configuration (limit, show_timestamps, show_levels, title)
- Implements Renderable trait for Console integration

Includes 11 passing tests covering all features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
